name: agent-rules-audit
description: Offline scanner for AI agent instruction files (AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, skills, MCP configs) — detects prompt-injection payloads, hidden Unicode, encoded blobs, exfiltration and privilege-escalation patterns. Zero dependencies, zero network calls.
author: Bharat Singh Parihar (https://github.com/bharat3645)
